upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Borough Hall/Court Street station); MTA key station accessibility records
notes: Elevator for 2/3 train platforms located in front of Brooklyn Borough Hall on Joralemon Street. Elevator installation began 1992 as part of MTA plan to make key stations accessible; completed 1993. Single platform elevator shaft connects upper mezzanine with the New Lots-bound platform with a stop for the Manhattan-bound platform. Different from Borough Hall 4/5 (ID 415) which was made accessible in December 2025 with a separate $106 million project.
